required_preferences.fact: Pauses all high-intensity or solo cycling until cleared by cardiologist—opts for gentle walks or accompanied strolls instead

supersedes.fact: Chooses local cycling trails with gradual elevation—avoids steep mountain routes to keep physical activity safe

required_preferences.fact: Initiates low-intensity walks with friends on Saturday mornings instead of group cycling—cycling is suspended due to cardiac restrictions

supersedes.fact: Goes cycling with at least one friend on Saturday mornings—never rides alone unless schedules clash

required_preferences.fact: Practices mindfulness meditation for 15 minutes each morning before leaving for work—never skips sessions, even when running late
Keeps emergency contact numbers clearly posted in common household areas for family awareness during his cardiac evaluation period
Initiates group chats with college friends to plan the annual camping trip—never lets someone else handle logistics
Logs all chest pain or unusual symptoms in a dedicated section of his health app immediately after each episode—never delays documentation until the end of the day

persona: A mid-career nonprofit director managing grant agreements and partnerships
